zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Pert於1387年出生時，她的父親William Pert48歲，母親Joan Scrope35歲。她於大約1405年與Thomas Hopton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年4月14日在英國素瑞貝爾蒙享年47歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Pert于1387年出生时，她的父亲William Pert48岁，母亲Joan Scrope35岁。她于大约1405年与Thomas Hopton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年4月14日在英国素瑞貝爾蒙享年47岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Peart  .

variants.name: Peart
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Perth (Perths), which is recorded as Pertc. 1128. The placename derives from Pictish perta ‘(at the) thicket, copse’.
English: nickname, probably from a shortened form of Middle English, Old French apert ‘open, plain to see’, of persons ‘frank, honest’ or ‘accomplished’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Pert was born in 1387, her father, William Pert, was 48 and her mother, Joan Scrope, was 35. She married Thomas Hopton about 1405. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 14 April 1434, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Pert est née en 1387, son père, William Pert, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan Scrope, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Hopton environ 1405. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1434, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Pert 1387 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pert 48 und ihre Mutter Joan Scrope 35. Sie hat um 1405 Thomas Hopton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 14. April 1434 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Bermondsey, Surrey, England und wurde in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Pert è nata il nel 1387, sua padre, William Pert, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Joan Scrope, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Hopton circa 1405. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 aprile 1434, nel Bermondsey, Surrey, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Pertが1387年に生まれた時，父William Pertは48歳，母Joan Scropeは35歳であった。約1405年にThomas Hoptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1434年4月14日にイギリススリーバーモンドセイで47歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Pert(이)가 1387년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pert(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Scrope(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1405년 Thomas Hopton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 4월 14일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Pert nasceu em 1387, seu pai, William Pert, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan Scrope, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Hopton aproximadamente 1405. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 14 de abril de 1434, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Pert родилась в 1387 г., её отцу по имени William Pert было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Scrope, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Hopton около 1405 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 14 апреля 1434 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Pert nació en 1387, su papá, William Pert, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan Scrope, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Thomas Hopton aproximadamente 1405. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de abril de 1434, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
